'''sorafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatropic|iatropic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatropic|iatropic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sorafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sorafithi|sorafithi]] || [[word:sorafiji|sorafiji]] || [[word:sorafishi|sorafishi]] || [[word:sorafiki|sorafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sorafuthuthu|sorafuthuthu]] || [[word:sorafujuju|sorafujuju]] || [[word:sorafushushu|sorafushushu]] || [[word:sorafukuku|sorafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sorafuthu|sorafuthu]] || [[word:sorafuju|sorafuju]] || [[word:sorafushu|sorafushu]] || [[word:sorafuku|sorafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sorafufthuf|sorafufthuf]] || [[word:sorafufjuf|sorafufjuf]] || [[word:sorafufshuf|sorafufshuf]] || [[word:sorafufkuf|sorafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sorafethe|sorafethe]] || [[word:sorafeje|sorafeje]] || [[word:sorafeshe|sorafeshe]] || [[word:sorafeke|sorafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sorafothotho|sorafothotho]] || [[word:sorafojojo|sorafojojo]] || [[word:sorafoshosho|sorafoshosho]] || [[word:sorafokoko|sorafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sorafotho|sorafotho]] || [[word:sorafojo|sorafojo]] || [[word:sorafosho|sorafosho]] || [[word:sorafoko|sorafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sorafofthof|sorafofthof]] || [[word:sorafofjof|sorafofjof]] || [[word:sorafofshof|sorafofshof]] || [[word:sorafofkof|sorafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfthÃŸf|sorafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfjÃŸf|sorafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfshÃŸf|sorafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfkÃŸf|sorafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|sorafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|sorafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|sorafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|sorafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfthÃŸf|sorafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfjÃŸf|sorafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfshÃŸf|sorafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfkÃŸf|sorafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfthÃŸf|sorafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfjÃŸf|sorafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfshÃŸf|sorafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sorafÃŸfkÃŸf|sorafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sorafÃḊthÃḊ|sorafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:sorafÃḊjÃḊ|sorafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:sorafÃḊshÃḊ|sorafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:sorafÃḊkÃḊ|sorafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sorafathatha|sorafathatha]] || [[word:sorafajaja|sorafajaja]] || [[word:sorafashasha|sorafashasha]] || [[word:sorafakaka|sorafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sorafatha|sorafatha]] || [[word:sorafaja|sorafaja]] || [[word:sorafasha|sorafasha]] || [[word:sorafaka|sorafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sorafafthaf|sorafafthaf]] || [[word:sorafafjaf|sorafafjaf]] || [[word:sorafafshaf|sorafafshaf]] || [[word:sorafafkaf|sorafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sorafasha|sorafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sorafshÃḋsha|sorafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sorafrosha|sorafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sorafmusha|sorafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sorafyasha|sorafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosorafnkshÃḋsha|gosorafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosorafnkrosha|gosorafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosorafnkmusha|gosorafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosorafnkyasha|gosorafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sorarafasha|sorarafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sorarafshÃḋsha|sorarafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sorarafrosha|sorarafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sorarafmusha|sorarafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sorarafyasha|sorarafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosorarafnkshÃḋsha|gosorarafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosorarafnkrosha|gosorarafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosorarafnkmusha|gosorarafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosorarafnkyasha|gosorarafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:serÃḊfasha|serÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:serÃḊfshÃḋsha|serÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:serÃḊfrosha|serÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:serÃḊfmusha|serÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:serÃḊfyasha|serÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goserÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|goserÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goserÃḊfnkrosha|goserÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goserÃḊfnkmusha|goserÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goserÃḊfnkyasha|goserÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sorfafasha|sorfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sorfafshÃḋsha|sorfafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sorfafrosha|sorfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sorfafmusha|sorfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sorfafyasha|sorfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosorfafnkshÃḋsha|gosorfafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosorfafnkrosha|gosorfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosorfafnkmusha|gosorfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosorfafnkyasha|gosorfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
